surprises.

No hidden fees, no per-alert charges. Pay for what you need and scale with confidence.

For small teams beginning their security journey.

Professional

For growing companies that need full-stack security coverage.

API access & integrations

Custom solutions for large-scale, complex security environments.

Custom
Unlimited endpoints
Advanced AI threat modeling
Dedicated security engineer
Custom compliance frameworks
